Tests multiplication of negative and positive infinity in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that verifies the behavior of JavaScript's `Number` object when multiplying `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` by `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY`. The assertion checks if the result of this multiplication is equal to `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY`. This test ensures that the JavaScript engine correctly handles the multiplication of infinite values according to the IEEE 754 standard for floating-point arithmetic. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation involving special numeric values.
